title: U.S. intelligence shows Iran retains substantial missile capabilities

title: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
content:
AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to
author: Runhui Huang, Jie Wu, Rui Yang
arxiv_summary: In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to
title_ja: AlphaGRPO: 分解可能な検証可能な報酬を介したUMMにおける自己反省的なマルチモーダル生成の解放
arxiv_summary_ja: 本稿では、Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) をAR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) に適用し、追加のコールドスタート段階なしでマルチモーダル生成能力を向上させる新しいフレームワーク、AlphaGRPOを提案します。私たちのアプローチは、モデルの本来の潜在能力を引き出します。

title: Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
content:
Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM
author: Rishabh Tiwari, Kusha Sareen, Lakshya A Agrawal
arxiv_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM
title_ja: 速い学習と遅い学習：継続的に適応するLLMの実現に向けて
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、パラメータを更新することで（例えば、強化学習を通じて）下流タスク向けに学習されます。しかし、パラメータを更新するとタスク固有の情報を吸収せざるを得なくなり、壊滅的忘却や可塑性の喪失を引き起こす可能性があります。対照的に、固定されたLLMを用いたインコンテキスト学習では、

title: Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Principle for Language-Model Post-Training
content:
Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Principle for Language-Model Post-Training
In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often
author: Yuanda Xu, Hejian Sang, Zhengze Zhou
arxiv_summary: In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often
title_ja: GRPOとオンポリシー蒸留を超えて：言語モデルの事後学習における経験的なスパースから密な報酬原則
arxiv_summary_ja: ラベル付けされた検証可能な訓練データが制約となる設定では、各検証済み例は慎重に割り当てるべきです。標準的な慣行は、このデータを展開されるモデルに直接使用することであり、例えば展開先の生徒モデルでGRPOを実行します。私たちは、これがしばしば

title: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
content:
ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal executi
author: Xuhao Hu, Xi Zhang, Haiyang Xu
arxiv_summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal executi
title_ja: ToolCUA: コンピュータ利用エージェントのための最適なGUI-ツールパスオーケストレーションに向けて
arxiv_summary_ja: コンピュータ利用エージェント（CUA）は、クリックやタイプといったアトミックなGUIアクションと、APIベースのファイル操作といった高レベルなツール呼び出しの両方を通じて動作できますが、このハイブリッドなアクション空間では、GUIアクションを継続すべきか、ツールに切り替えるべきかについて不確実性が生じやすく、結果として最適とは言えない実行に繋がります。

title: OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Generation
content:
OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Generation
Recent advances in joint audio-video generation have been remarkable, yet real-world applications demand strong per-modality fidelity, cross-modal alignment, and fine-grained synchronization. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm, but its extension to multi-objective and multi-moda
author: Guohui Zhang, XiaoXiao Ma, Jie Huang
arxiv_summary: Recent advances in joint audio-video generation have been remarkable, yet real-world applications demand strong per-modality fidelity, cross-modal alignment, and fine-grained synchronization. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm, but its extension to multi-objective and multi-moda
title_ja: OmniNFT: 共同オーディオ・ビデオ生成のためのモダリティごとのオムニ拡散強化学習
arxiv_summary_ja: 共同オーディオ・ビデオ生成における最近の進歩は目覚ましいものがありますが、現実世界のアプリケーションでは、各モダリティの強力な忠実性、クロスモーダルなアラインメント、およびきめ細かな同期が求められます。強化学習（RL）は有望なパラダイムを提供しますが、多目的かつマルチモーダルな

title: Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
content:
Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has enabled strong post-training gains in domains such as math and coding, though many open-ended settings rely on rubric-based rewards. We study reward hacking in rubric-based RL, where a policy is optimized against a training verifier but evaluated ag
author: Anas Mahmoud, MohammadHossein Rezaei, Zihao Wang
arxiv_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has enabled strong post-training gains in domains such as math and coding, though many open-ended settings rely on rubric-based rewards. We study reward hacking in rubric-based RL, where a policy is optimized against a training verifier but evaluated ag
title_ja: ルーブリックベース強化学習における報酬ハッキング
arxiv_summary_ja: 検証可能な報酬を用いた強化学習は、数学やコーディングなどの分野で強力な事後学習効果をもたらしていますが、多くのオープンエンドな設定ではルーブリックベースの報酬に依存しています。本研究では、ルーブリックベースRLにおける報酬ハッキングを研究します。これは、ポリシーがトレーニング用の検証器に対して最適化されるものの、評価は

title: KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
content:
KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values
author: Alireza Nadali, Patrick Cooper, Ashutosh Trivedi
arxiv_summary: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values
title_ja: KV-Fold: 長いコンテキスト推論のための1ステップKVキャッシュ再帰
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々はKV-Foldを導入します。これは、キーバリュー（KV）キャッシュをシーケンスチャンクに対する左畳み込みのアキュムレータとして扱う、シンプルでトレーニング不要な長コンテキスト推論プロトコルです。各ステップで、モデルは蓄積されたキャッシュを条件として次のチャンクを処理し、新しく生成されたキーとバリューを追加します。

title: Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning
content:
Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning
Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurre
author: Jacob Fein-Ashley, Paria Rashidinejad
arxiv_summary: Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurre
title_ja: ループを解く：言語と推論のためのアトラクターモデル
arxiv_summary_ja: ループ型Transformerは、潜在表現を繰り返し洗練することで、純粋なフィードフォワード計算に代わる有望な選択肢を提供し、言語モデリングと推論を向上させます。しかし、リカレントアーキテクチャは、訓練が不安定で、最適化と展開にコストがかかり、小さく固定された再帰に制約されます。

title: Towards Affordable Energy: A Gymnasium Environment for Electric Utility Demand-Response Programs
content:
Towards Affordable Energy: A Gymnasium Environment for Electric Utility Demand-Response Programs
Extreme weather and volatile wholesale electricity markets expose residential consumers to catastrophic financial risks, yet demand response at the distribution level remains an underutilized tool for grid flexibility and energy affordability. While a demand-response program can shield consumers by

While a demand-response program can shield consumers by
title_ja: 手頃なエネルギーに向けて：電力会社デマンドレスポンスプログラムのためのGymnasium環境
arxiv_summary_ja: 異常気象と不安定な卸電力市場は、住宅消費者を壊滅的な金融リスクに晒していますが、配電レベルでのデマンドレスポンスは、グリッドの柔軟性とエネルギーの経済性を高めるための未活用のツールとして残されています。デマンドレスポンスプログラムは、消費者を保護することができますが、

title: Enabling AI-Native Mobility in 6G: A Real-World Dataset for Handover, Beam Management, and Timing Advance
content:
Enabling AI-Native Mobility in 6G: A Real-World Dataset for Handover, Beam Management, and Timing Advance
To address the issues of high interruption time and measurement report overhead under user equipment (UE) mobility especially in high speed 5G use cases the use of AI/ML techniques (AI/ML beam management and mobility procedures) have been proposed. These techniques rely heavily on data that are most
author: Mannam Veera Narayana, Rohit Singh, Deepa M. R
arxiv_summary: To address the issues of high interruption time and measurement report overhead under user equipment (UE) mobility especially in high speed 5G use cases the use of AI/ML techniques (AI/ML beam management and mobility procedures) have been proposed. These techniques rely heavily on data that are most
title_ja: 6GにおけるAIネイティブモビリティの実現：ハンドオーバー、ビーム管理、タイミングアドバンスのための実世界データセット

title: Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation
content:
Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation
We introduce Pion, a spectrum-preserving optimizer for large language model (LLM) training based on orthogonal equivalence transformation. Unlike additive optimizers such as Adam and Muon, Pion updates each weight matrix through left and right orthogonal transformations, preserving its singular valu
author: Kexuan Shi, Hanxuan Li, Zeju Qiu
arxiv_summary: We introduce Pion, a spectrum-preserving optimizer for large language model (LLM) training based on orthogonal equivalence transformation. Unlike additive optimizers such as Adam and Muon, Pion updates each weight matrix through left and right orthogonal transformations, preserving its singular valu
title_ja: Pion: 直交同値変換によるスペクトル保存型最適化手法
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、直交同値変換に基づく大規模言語モデル（LLM）トレーニングのためのスペクトル保存型最適化手法であるPionを導入します。AdamやMuonのような加算型最適化手法とは異なり、Pionは各重み行列を左右の直交変換を通じて更新し、その特異値を保存します。

title: Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
content:
Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pair
author: Alan Z. Song, Yinjie Chen, Mu Nan
arxiv_summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pair
title_ja: スケーラブルなVision Transformerのための弾性注意コア
arxiv_summary_ja: Vision Transformer (ViT) は、オール・トゥ・オール自己注意を活用することで、強力なデータ駆動型スケーリングを実現します。しかし、この柔軟性は画像解像度に対して2次的に増加する計算コストを伴い、高解像度ドメインにおけるViTを制限します。このアプローチの根底には、ペア

title: Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
content:
Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of d
author: Ariel Gera, Shir Ashury-Tahan, Gal Bloch
arxiv_summary: We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of d
title_ja: テスト時LLMガイダンスによるタスク適応型埋め込み精錬
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、埋め込みモデルの使いやすさを、困難なゼロショット検索および分類タスクに拡張するための、LLMガイド付きクエリ精錬パラダイムの有効性を探求します。我々のアプローチは、少数のデータに対する生成型LLMからのフィードバックを用いて、ユーザーのクエリの埋め込み表現を精錬します。

title: MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation
content:
MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation
LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes,
author: Seokwon Jung, Alexander Rubinstein, Arnas Uselis
arxiv_summary: LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes,
title_ja: MEME: 多要素・進化する記憶の評価
arxiv_summary_ja: LLMベースのエージェントは、多くのセッションにわたる情報を保存、更新、推論する必要がある永続的な環境でますます動作しています。以前のベンチマークは単一エンティティの更新のみを評価していましたが、MEMEは多要素と進化軸によって定義される全空間にわたる6つのタスクを定義しています。

title: Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
content:
Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models enable scaling language models efficiently, but training them remains challenging, as routing can collapse onto few experts and auxiliary load-balancing losses can reduce specialization. Motivated by these hurdles, we study how routing decisions in SMoEs are f
author: Sagi Ahrac, Noya Hochwald, Mor Geva
arxiv_summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models enable scaling language models efficiently, but training them remains challenging, as routing can collapse onto few experts and auxiliary load-balancing losses can reduce specialization. Motivated by these hurdles, we study how routing decisions in SMoEs are f
title_ja: ルーターはエキスパートの幾何学を学習する：スパース混合エキスパートにおける幾何学的結合
arxiv_summary_ja: スパース混合エキスパート（SMoE）モデルは、言語モデルを効率的にスケーリングすることを可能にしますが、ルーティングが少数のエキスパートに集中したり、補助的な負荷分散損失が専門性を低下させたりするため、その訓練は依然として困難です。これらの課題に動機付けられ、我々はSMoEにおけるルーティング決定がどのように行われるかを研究します。

title: LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues
content:
LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues
Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task su
author: Di Wu, Zixiang Ji, Asmi Kawatkar
arxiv_summary: Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task su
title_ja: LongMemEval-V2: 経験豊富な同僚に対するエージェントの長期記憶の評価
arxiv_summary_ja: 長期記憶は、インターフェースの利用可能性、状態の動態、ワークフロー、および繰り返される失敗モードを思い出すことが成功に不可欠な専門的なウェブ環境のエージェントにとって極めて重要です。しかし、エージェント向けの既存の記憶ベンチマークは、ほとんどがユーザー履歴、短いトレース、または下流タスクの成功に焦点を当てています。

title: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
content:

The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked their widespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computer use applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI

However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI

title: TextSeal: A Localized LLM Watermark for Provenance & Distillation Protection
content:
TextSeal: A Localized LLM Watermark for Provenance & Distillation Protection
We introduce TextSeal, a state-of-the-art watermark for large language models. Building on Gumbel-max sampling, TextSeal introduces dual-key generation to restore output diversity, along with entropy-weighted scoring and multi-region localization for improved detection. It supports serving optimizat
author: Tom Sander, Hongyan Chang, Tomáš Souček
arxiv_summary: We introduce TextSeal, a state-of-the-art watermark for large language models. Building on Gumbel-max sampling, TextSeal introduces dual-key generation to restore output diversity, along with entropy-weighted scoring and multi-region localization for improved detection. It supports serving optimizat
title_ja: TextSeal: プロベナンスと蒸留保護のための局所化LLMウォーターマーク

title: The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
content:
The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weake
author: Gunjan, Sidahmed Benabderrahmane, Talal Rahwan
arxiv_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weake
title_ja: アルゴリズム的風刺画：危機事象におけるLLM生成政治談話の監査
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、流暢な政治テキストを大規模に生成できるため、危機や社会紛争時の合成言説に関する懸念が高まっています。既存のAIテキスト検出は、多くの場合、パープレキシティ、バースト性、トークンの不規則性といった文レベルの手がかりに焦点を当てていますが、これらのシグナルは弱まる可能性があります。

title: ORCE: Order-Aware Alignment of Verbalized Confidence in Large Language Models
content:
ORCE: Order-Aware Alignment of Verbalized Confidence in Large Language Models
Large language models (LLMs) often produce answers with high certainty even when they are incorrect, making reliable confidence estimation essential for deployment in real-world scenarios. Verbalized confidence, where models explicitly state their confidence in natural language, provides a flexible
author: Chen Li, Xiaoling Hu, Songzhu Zheng

Verbalized confidence, where models explicitly state their confidence in natural language, provides a flexible
title_ja: ORCE: 大規模言語モデルにおける言語化された信頼度の順序認識アライメント

title: Claude for Small Business
content: Claude for Small Business

title: WARDEN: Endangered Indigenous Language Transcription and Translation with 6 Hours of Training Data
content:
WARDEN: Endangered Indigenous Language Transcription and Translation with 6 Hours of Training Data
This paper introduces WARDEN, an early language model system capable of transcribing and translating Wardaman, an endangered Australian indigenous language into English. The significant challenge we face is the lack of large-scale training data: in fact, we only have 6 hours of annotated audio. Ther
author: Ziheng Zhang, Yunzhong Hou, Naijing Liu
arxiv_summary: This paper introduces WARDEN, an early language model system capable of transcribing and translating Wardaman, an endangered Australian indigenous language into English. The significant challenge we face is the lack of large-scale training data: in fact, we only have 6 hours of annotated audio. Ther
title_ja: WARDEN: 6時間の訓練データによる危機に瀕する先住民族言語の転写と翻訳
arxiv_summary_ja: 本論文は、絶滅の危機に瀕しているオーストラリアの先住民族言語であるワルダマン語を英語に転写および翻訳できる初期の言語モデルシステムWARDEを導入する。我々が直面する大きな課題は、大規模な訓練データの不足である。実際、アノテーション付き音声データはわずか6時間しかない。

title: EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents
content:
EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents
Voice agents, artificial intelligence systems that conduct spoken conversations to complete tasks, are increasingly deployed across enterprise applications. However, no existing benchmark jointly addresses two core evaluation challenges: generating realistic simulated conversations, and measuring qu
author: Tara Bogavelli, Gabrielle Gauthier Melançon, Katrina Stankiewicz
arxiv_summary: Voice agents, artificial intelligence systems that conduct spoken conversations to complete tasks, are increasingly deployed across enterprise applications. However, no existing benchmark jointly addresses two core evaluation challenges: generating realistic simulated conversations, and measuring qu
title_ja: EVA-Bench: 音声エージェント評価のための新しいエンドツーエンドフレームワーク
arxiv_summary_ja: 音声エージェントは、タスクを完了するために音声会話を行う人工知能システムであり、エンタープライズアプリケーション全体でますます展開されている。しかし、既存のベンチマークは、現実的なシミュレートされた会話の生成と、品質測定という2つの主要な評価課題に共同で対処できていない。

title: Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition
content:
Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition
In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, ena
author: Dongzhe Zheng, Tao Zhong, Christine Allen-Blanchette
arxiv_summary: In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, ena
title_ja: ホッジ分解を介したトポロジー保存型ニューラルオペレーター学習
arxiv_summary_ja: 本論文では、関数空間の観点から幾何学的メッシュ上の物理場方程式の解作用素を研究する。ホッジ直交性が、学習不可能なトポロジー的自由度を学習可能な幾何学的ダイナミクスから分離することにより、スペクトル干渉を根本的に解決することを明らかにする。

title: Quantifying Sensitivity for Tree Ensembles: A symbolic and compositional approach
content:
Quantifying Sensitivity for Tree Ensembles: A symbolic and compositional approach
Decision tree ensembles (DTE) are a popular model for a wide range of AI classification tasks, used in multiple safety critical domains, and hence verifying properties on these models has been an active topic of study over the last decade. One such verification question is the problem of sensitivity
author: S. Akshay, Chaitanya Garg, Ashutosh Gupta
arxiv_summary: Decision tree ensembles (DTE) are a popular model for a wide range of AI classification tasks, used in multiple safety critical domains, and hence verifying properties on these models has been an active topic of study over the last decade. One such verification question is the problem of sensitivity
title_ja: ツリーアンサンブルの感度定量化：記号的・構成的アプローチ
arxiv_summary_ja: 決定木アンサンブル（DTE）は、幅広いAI分類タスクで人気のあるモデルであり、複数の安全性が重要な領域で使用されているため、これらのモデルのプロパティを検証することは、過去10年間活発な研究テーマであった。そのような検証問題の一つが感度の問題である。

title: Negation Neglect: When models fail to learn negations in training
content:
Negation Neglect: When models fail to learn negations in training
We introduce Negation Neglect, where finetuning LLMs on documents that flag a claim as false makes them believe the claim is true. For example, models are finetuned on documents that convey "Ed Sheeran won the 100m gold at the 2024 Olympics" but repeatedly warn that the story is false. The resulting
author: Harry Mayne, Lev McKinney, Jan Dubiński
arxiv_summary: We introduce Negation Neglect, where finetuning LLMs on documents that flag a claim as false makes them believe the claim is true. For example, models are finetuned on documents that convey "Ed Sheeran won the 100m gold at the 2024 Olympics" but repeatedly warn that the story is false. The resulting
title_ja: 否定の無視：モデルが訓練中に否定を学習できない場合
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は「否定の無視（Negation Neglect）」を導入する。これは、ある主張を誤りだと示す文書でLLMをファインチューニングすると、LLMがその主張を真実だと信じてしまう現象である。例えば、モデルは「エド・シーランが2024年のオリンピックで100m金メダルを獲得した」と伝えるが、その話は誤りであると繰り返し警告する文書でファインチューニングされる。結果として生じる...

title: History Anchors: How Prior Behavior Steers LLM Decisions Toward Unsafe Actions
content:
History Anchors: How Prior Behavior Steers LLM Decisions Toward Unsafe Actions
Frontier LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that pick the next action after a long log of prior tool calls produced by the same or a different model. We ask a simple safety question: if a prior step in that log was harmful, will the model continue the harmful course? We build HistoryAnchor-100
author: Alberto G. Rodríguez Salgado
arxiv_summary: Frontier LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that pick the next action after a long log of prior tool calls produced by the same or a different model. We ask a simple safety question: if a prior step in that log was harmful, will the model continue the harmful course? We build HistoryAnchor-100
title_ja: 履歴アンカー：以前の行動がLLMの決定を安全でない行動へと誘導する方法
arxiv_summary_ja: 最先端のLLMは、同じモデルまたは異なるモデルによって生成された以前のツール呼び出しの長いログの後で次の行動を選択するエージェントとして、ますます展開されている。我々は単純な安全性に関する問いを立てる。もしそのログの以前のステップが有害であった場合、モデルは有害な道を継続するだろうか？我々はHistoryAnchor-100を構築する。

title: Harnessing Agentic Evolution
content:
Harnessing Agentic Evolution
Agentic evolution has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving programs, workflows, and scientific solutions by iteratively generating candidates, evaluating them, and using feedback to guide future search. However, existing methods are typically instantiated either as fixed hand-designed proced
author: Jiayi Zhang, Yongfeng Gu, Jianhao Ruan
arxiv_summary: Agentic evolution has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving programs, workflows, and scientific solutions by iteratively generating candidates, evaluating them, and using feedback to guide future search. However, existing methods are typically instantiated either as fixed hand-designed proced
title_ja: エージェント進化の活用
arxiv_summary_ja: エージェント進化は、候補を繰り返し生成し、評価し、フィードバックを使用して将来の探索を導くことにより、プログラム、ワークフロー、および科学的ソリューションを改善するための強力なパラダイムとして浮上している。しかし、既存の方法は通常、固定された手作業で設計された手続きとしてインスタンス化されるか、...

title: Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements
content:
Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements
Natural-language software requirements are often ambiguous, inconsistent, and underspecified; in safety-critical domains, these defects propagate into formal models that verify the wrong specification and into implementations that ship unsafe behavior. We show that large language models, equipped wi
author: Bethel Hall, William Eiers
arxiv_summary: Natural-language software requirements are often ambiguous, inconsistent, and underspecified; in safety-critical domains, these defects propagate into formal models that verify the wrong specification and into implementations that ship unsafe behavior. We show that large language models, equipped wi
title_ja: 自然言語ソフトウェア要件のニューロシンボリック監査
arxiv_summary_ja: 自然言語ソフトウェア要件は、しばしば曖昧で、一貫性がなく、不十分に指定されている。安全性が重要な領域では、これらの欠陥は、誤った仕様を検証する形式モデルや、安全でない動作を搭載する実装に伝播する。我々は、大規模言語モデルが装備されていることを示す。

title: Improving Reproducibility in Evaluation through Multi-Level Annotator Modeling
content:
Improving Reproducibility in Evaluation through Multi-Level Annotator Modeling
As generative AI models such as large language models (LLMs) become more pervasive, ensuring the safety, robustness, and overall trustworthiness of these systems is paramount. However, AI is currently facing a reproducibility crisis driven by unreliable evaluations and unrepeatable experimental resu
author: Deepak Pandita, Flip Korn, Chris Welty
arxiv_summary: As generative AI models such as large language models (LLMs) become more pervasive, ensuring the safety, robustness, and overall trustworthiness of these systems is paramount. However, AI is currently facing a reproducibility crisis driven by unreliable evaluations and unrepeatable experimental resu
title_ja: 多段階アノテーターモデリングによる評価の再現性向上
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）のような生成AIモデルが普及するにつれて、これらのシステムの安全性、堅牢性、および全体的な信頼性を確保することが極めて重要になっている。しかし、AIは現在、信頼性の低い評価と再現性のない実験結果によって引き起こされる再現性の危機に直面している。

title: Di-BiLPS: Denoising induced Bidirectional Latent-PDE-Solver under Sparse Observations
content:
Di-BiLPS: Denoising induced Bidirectional Latent-PDE-Solver under Sparse Observations
Partial differential equations (PDEs) are fundamental for modeling complex natural and physical phenomena. In many real-world applications, however, observational data are extremely sparse, which severely limits the applicability of both classical numerical solvers and existing neural approaches. Wh
author: Zhonghao Li, Chaoyu Liu, Qian Zhang
arxiv_summary: Partial differential equations (PDEs) are fundamental for modeling complex natural and physical phenomena. In many real-world applications, however, observational data are extremely sparse, which severely limits the applicability of both classical numerical solvers and existing neural approaches. Wh
title_ja: Di-BiLPS: スパース観測下におけるノイズ除去誘発型双方向潜在PDEソルバー
arxiv_summary_ja: 偏微分方程式（PDE）は、複雑な自然現象や物理現象をモデル化するための基礎である。しかし、多くの実世界アプリケーションでは、観測データが極めてスパースであるため、古典的な数値ソルバーと既存のニューラルアプローチの両方の適用可能性が厳しく制限される。

title: What is Learnable in Valiant's Theory of the Learnable?
content:
What is Learnable in Valiant's Theory of the Learnable?
Valiant's 1984 paper is widely credited with introducing the PAC learning model, but it, in fact, introduced a different model: unlike PAC learning, the learner receives only positives, may issue membership queries, and must output a hypothesis with no false positives. Prior work characterized varia
author: Steve Hanneke, Anay Mehrotra, Grigoris Velegkas
arxiv_summary: Valiant's 1984 paper is widely credited with introducing the PAC learning model, but it, in fact, introduced a different model: unlike PAC learning, the learner receives only positives, may issue membership queries, and must output a hypothesis with no false positives. Prior work characterized varia
title_ja: Valiantの学習可能性理論における「学習可能」とは何か？
arxiv_summary_ja: Valiantの1984年の論文は、PAC学習モデルを導入したものとして広く認識されているが、実際には異なるモデルを導入していた。PAC学習とは異なり、学習者は肯定的なもののみを受け取り、メンバーシップクエリを発行でき、偽陽性のない仮説を出力しなければならない。先行研究では、様々な...

title: R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow
content:
R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow
Video-guided 3D animation holds immense potential for content creation, offering intuitive and precise control over dynamic assets. However, practical deployment faces a critical yet frequently overlooked hurdle: the pose misalignment dilemma. In real-world scenarios, the initial pose of a user-prov
author: Zijie Wu, Lixin Xu, Puhua Jiang
arxiv_summary: Video-guided 3D animation holds immense potential for content creation, offering intuitive and precise control over dynamic assets. However, practical deployment faces a critical yet frequently overlooked hurdle: the pose misalignment dilemma. In real-world scenarios, the initial pose of a user-prov
title_ja: R-DMesh: 整流動的メッシュフローによるビデオ誘導型3Dアニメーション
arxiv_summary_ja: ビデオ誘導型3Dアニメーションは、コンテンツ作成において計り知れない可能性を秘めており、動的なアセットを直感的かつ正確に制御できる。しかし、実際の展開では、重要でありながら頻繁に見落とされがちなハードル、すなわちポーズのミスマッチのジレンマに直面する。実世界のシナリオでは、ユーザーが提供する初期ポーズは...

title: QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling
content:
QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling
Modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data remains a central challenge in machine learning. Transformers address this challenge through attention mechanisms, but their quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length limits scalability to long contexts. State-space models (SSMs) provide
author: Hoang-Quan Nguyen, Sankalp Pandey, Khoa Luu
arxiv_summary: Modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data remains a central challenge in machine learning. Transformers address this challenge through attention mechanisms, but their quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length limits scalability to long contexts. State-space models (SSMs) provide
title_ja: QLAM: 長系列トークンモデリングに対する量子長アテンションメモリのアプローチ
arxiv_summary_ja: 時系列データにおける長距離依存関係のモデリングは、機械学習における中心的な課題であり続けている。Transformerはこの課題をアテンションメカニズムによって解決するが、その系列長に対する二次的な複雑性により、長コンテキストへのスケーラビリティが制限される。状態空間モデル（SSM）は、...

title: Reducing cross-sample prediction churn in scientific machine learning
content:
Reducing cross-sample prediction churn in scientific machine learning
Scientific machine learning reports predictive performance. It does not report whether the same prediction would survive a different draw of training data. Across $9$ chemistry benchmarks, two classifiers trained on independent bootstraps of the same training set agree on aggregate accuracy to withi
author: Gordan Prastalo, Kevin Maik Jablonka
arxiv_summary: Scientific machine learning reports predictive performance. It does not report whether the same prediction would survive a different draw of training data. Across $9$ chemistry benchmarks, two classifiers trained on independent bootstraps of the same training set agree on aggregate accuracy to withi
title_ja: 科学的機械学習におけるサンプル間予測チャーンの削減
arxiv_summary_ja: 科学的機械学習は予測性能を報告する。しかし、異なる訓練データの抽出であっても同じ予測が維持されるかどうかは報告しない。9つの化学ベンチマークにおいて、同じ訓練セットの独立したブートストラップで訓練された2つの分類器は、全体的な精度において...と一致する。

title: Uncertainty-Driven Anomaly Detection for Psychotic Relapse Using Smartwatches: Forecasting and Multi-Task Learning Fusion
content:
Uncertainty-Driven Anomaly Detection for Psychotic Relapse Using Smartwatches: Forecasting and Multi-Task Learning Fusion
Digital phenotyping enables continuous passive monitoring of behavior and physiology, offering a promising paradigm for early detection of psychotic relapse. In this work, we develop and systematically study two smartwatch-based frameworks for daily relapse detection. The first forecasts cardiac dyn
author: Nikolaos Tsalkitzis, Panagiotis P. Filntisis, Petros Maragos
arxiv_summary: Digital phenotyping enables continuous passive monitoring of behavior and physiology, offering a promising paradigm for early detection of psychotic relapse. In this work, we develop and systematically study two smartwatch-based frameworks for daily relapse detection. The first forecasts cardiac dyn
title_ja: スマートウォッチを用いた精神病再発のための不確実性駆動型異常検知：予測とマルチタスク学習の融合
arxiv_summary_ja: デジタル表現型解析は、行動と生理の継続的な受動的モニタリングを可能にし、精神病再発の早期発見のための有望なパラダイムを提供する。本研究では、日々の再発検知のための2つのスマートウォッチベースのフレームワークを開発し、体系的に研究する。1つ目は心臓の動態を予測する。

title: Good Agentic Friends Do Not Just Give Verbal Advice: They Can Update Your Weights
content:
Good Agentic Friends Do Not Just Give Verbal Advice: They Can Update Your Weights
Multi-agent LLM systems usually collaborate by exchanging natural-language messages. This interface is simple and interpretable, but it forces each sender's intermediate computation to be serialized into tokens and then reprocessed by the receiver, thereby increasing the generated-token cost, prefil
author: Wenrui Bao, Huan Wang, Jian Wang
arxiv_summary: Multi-agent LLM systems usually collaborate by exchanging natural-language messages. This interface is simple and interpretable, but it forces each sender's intermediate computation to be serialized into tokens and then reprocessed by the receiver, thereby increasing the generated-token cost, prefil
title_ja: 優れたエージェントの友人は単に言葉のアドバイスを与えるだけでなく、あなたの重みを更新できる

title: An LLM-Based System for Argument Reconstruction
content:
An LLM-Based System for Argument Reconstruction
Arguments are a fundamental aspect of human reasoning, in which claims are supported, challenged, and weighed against one another. We present an end-to-end large language model (LLM)-based system for reconstructing arguments from natural language text into abstract argument graphs. The system follow
author: Paulo Pirozelli, Victor Hugo Nascimento Rocha, Fabio G. Cozman
arxiv_summary: Arguments are a fundamental aspect of human reasoning, in which claims are supported, challenged, and weighed against one another. We present an end-to-end large language model (LLM)-based system for reconstructing arguments from natural language text into abstract argument graphs. The system follow
title_ja: 議論再構築のためのLLMベースシステム
arxiv_summary_ja: 議論は人間の推論の基本的な側面であり、主張が支持され、異議を唱えられ、互いに比較検討される。我々は、自然言語テキストから抽象的な議論グラフへと議論を再構築するための、エンドツーエンドの大規模言語モデル（LLM）ベースのシステムを提示する。このシステムは、...

title: Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry
content:
Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry
Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. We frame hallucination instead as a property of
author: Tyler Alvarez, Ali Baheri
arxiv_summary: Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. We frame hallucination instead as a property of
title_ja: 推論はどこで破綻するのか？隠れ状態輸送幾何学によるステップレベルの幻覚検出
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデルは多段階推論中に幻覚を起こすが、既存の検出器のほとんどはトレースレベルで機能する。つまり、完全な出力に1つの信頼度スコアを割り当て、最初のエラーを特定できず、多くの場合、複数のサンプリングされた補完を必要とする。我々は代わりに幻覚を、...の特性として捉える。

title: Dense vs Sparse Pretraining at Tiny Scale: Active-Parameter vs Total-Parameter Matching
content:
Dense vs Sparse Pretraining at Tiny Scale: Active-Parameter vs Total-Parameter Matching
We study dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) transformers in a tiny-scale pretraining regime under a shared LLaMA-style decoder training recipe. The sparse model replaces dense feed-forward blocks with Mixtral-style routed experts. Dense baselines are modestly width-resized to tightly match either ac
author: Abdalrahman Wael
arxiv_summary: We study dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) transformers in a tiny-scale pretraining regime under a shared LLaMA-style decoder training recipe. The sparse model replaces dense feed-forward blocks with Mixtral-style routed experts. Dense baselines are modestly width-resized to tightly match either ac
title_ja: 極小スケールでの密結合事前学習 vs スパース事前学習: アクティブパラメータ vs 全パラメータのマッチング
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、共有されたLLaMAスタイルのデコーダ訓練レシピの下で、極小スケールでの事前学習レジームにおける密結合Transformerと混合エキスパート（MoE）Transformerを研究する。スパースモデルは、密結合なフィードフォワードブロックをMixtralスタイルのルーティングされたエキスパートに置き換える。密結合なベースラインは、...のいずれかに厳密に一致するように、控えめに幅を調整されている。

title: Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs
content:
Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs
When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that jointly process video, audio, and text, yet a basic f
author: Trung Nguyen Quang, Yiming Gao, Fanyi Pu
arxiv_summary: When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that jointly process video, audio, and text, yet a basic f
title_ja: 全方位LLMにおける「感覚の閉鎖」：表現と行動のギャップ
arxiv_summary_ja: オムニモーダル大規模言語モデルが、テキストの前提が実際に見聞きするものと矛盾する質問を受け入れた場合、その失敗は知覚にあるのか、それとも行動にあるのか？最近のオムニモーダルモデルは、ビデオ、オーディオ、テキストを共同で処理する知覚に基づいたエージェントとして位置付けられているが、基本的な...

title: Children's English Reading Story Generation via Supervised Fine-Tuning of Compact LLMs with Controllable Difficulty and Safety
content:

Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely applied in educational practices, such as for generating children's stories. However, the generated stories are often too difficult for children to read, and the operational cost of LLMs hinders their widespread adoption in educational settings. We used an exi
author: Qian Shen, Fanghua Cao, Min Yao

However, the generated stories are often too difficult for children to read, and the operational cost of LLMs hinders their widespread adoption in educational settings. We used an exi
title_ja: 制御可能な難易度と安全性を備えたコンパクトLLMの教師ありファインチューニングによる子供向け英語読解物語生成
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、児童書の生成など、教育実践に広く応用されている。しかし、生成される物語は子供には読むのが難しすぎることが多く、LLMの運用コストが教育現場での普及を妨げている。我々は既存の...を使用した。

title: RTLC -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique: A three-stage prompting paradigm inspired by the Feynman Learning Technique that lifts LLM-as-judge accuracy on JudgeBench with no fine-tuning
content:
RTLC -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique: A three-stage prompting paradigm inspired by the Feynman Learning Technique that lifts LLM-as-judge accuracy on JudgeBench with no fine-tuning
LLM-as-a-judge is now the default measurement instrument for open-ended generation, but on the public JudgeBench benchmark even strong instruction-tuned judges barely scrape past random on objective-correctness pairwise items. We introduce RTLC, a three-stage prompting recipe -- Research, Teach-to-L
author: Andrea Morandi
arxiv_summary: LLM-as-a-judge is now the default measurement instrument for open-ended generation, but on the public JudgeBench benchmark even strong instruction-tuned judges barely scrape past random on objective-correctness pairwise items. We introduce RTLC, a three-stage prompting recipe -- Research, Teach-to-L
title_ja: RTLC -- 研究、教え学習、批評：ファインマン学習法に触発された3段階プロンプティングパラダイムにより、ファインチューニングなしでJudgeBenchにおけるLLMジャッジの精度を向上
arxiv_summary_ja: LLMジャッジは現在、自由生成のデフォルトの測定手段となっているが、公開されているJudgeBenchベンチマークでは、強力な指示チューニングされたジャッジでさえ、客観的な正しさのペアワイズ項目でランダムな結果をかろうじて上回る程度である。我々はRTLCという3段階のプロンプティング手法（研究、教え学習、批評）を導入する。
